title: SpaceX readies 12th test flight of massive Starship rocket as IPO looms
summary: SpaceX's planned Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.

title: Cleveland Cavaliers owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
summary: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.

title: SpaceX is heavily reliant on Starlink for growth and profit as it marches toward Nasdaq listing
summary: SpaceX's IPO prospectus underscores the importance of Starlink to the company's operations.

title: How to make sense of SpaceX’s nonsensical valuation
summary: The market has never before had to price a stock so speculative yet so large

title: Security researcher describes freshly uncovered Windows 11 vulnerability as 'one of the most insane discoveries I ever found.'
body: A security researcher going by the GitHub handle Nightmare-Eclipse disclosed a potentially nasty BitLocker bypass in Windows 11 earlier this month. Dubbed YellowKey , the exploit allows an attacker to read the contents of a BitLocker-encrypted drive by abusing standard behavior of the Windows Recovery Environment. Nightmare-Eclipse adds that, as far as their testing is concerned, the vulnerability only appears to be present in Windows 11. The security researcher describes it as "one of the most insane discoveries I ever found." This week Microsoft acknowledged the vulnerability , and criticised the public sharing of the YellowKey proof of concept, saying this violates "coordinated vulnerability best practices." The company has since designated the vulnerability CVE-2026-45585 , and provided some mitigation guidance, but the BitLocker bypass remains unpatched at time of writing. That said, the fact this attack requires physical access to a targeted device offers some amount of mitigation in itself. Cybersecurity firm Eclypsium breaks the vulnerability down in a recent blog post , explaining YellowKey works by leveraging the Windows Recovery Environment to "grant a fully unlocked co…
